violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of kitchen cabinets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the cabinet have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025
Establishment does not have a way to wash, rinse, and sanitize serving utensils. PIC notified to use disposable utensils. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator and kitchen cabinets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
Establishment does not have a way to wash, rinse, and sanitize serving utensils. PIC notified to use disposable utensils. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator and kitchen cabinets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

The floors in the near refrigerator and hot hold unit area has an accumulation of soil residue and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024
